title: eleocharis trilateralis
intro: Eleocharis trilateralis, also known as the three-angled spikesedge, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eleocharis trilateralis include its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, fever reduction, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into tea, capsules, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional remedies such as infusions and poultices.
